name: update_package_json_script
description: Add or update a single npm package.json script in the current workspace.

script_name.description: The package.json scripts key to add or update.

script_command.description: The command to assign to the script.

handler: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='package.json'; const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8')); pkg.scripts={...(pkg.scripts||{}), [process.argv[1]]: process.argv[2]}; fs.writeFileSync(p, JSON.stringify(pkg,null,2)+'\n');" {{script_name}} {{script_command}}
